context.role: Echo expressing joy after being petted
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60 on perch
context.usage_scenario: Triggered by petting interaction; plays for 5 seconds then returns to idle; spawns heart particle effects

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with fully raised crest (5-6px tall spikes), slightly puffed body, wings partially spread
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1-2: crest raising, Frame 3-4: body swaying left, Frame 5-6: wings slightly spreading (4px extension), Frame 7-8: body swaying right and returning to center

visual_specification.details: Crest fully erect with 4-5 individual spikes; eyes wide open (2x2px); wings extend 4px from body in frames 5-6; body sways 3-4px left/right

relationships.shared_with: Same base body structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (crest raised vs normal), echo_singing (no open beak)
